description: CZ opens the session discussing the upcoming NFT Tuesday webinars focused on GameFi and Play2Earn, highlighting the importance of these trends in Southeast Asia and globally. The session includes a special learn and earn opportunity with $12,500 in tokens to win.
topic_summary: The session introduces a series of webinars on NFT Tuesday, covering GameFi, minting value, and NFTs for good, emphasizing the evolution of NFTs and community engagement through a new Binance Discord.
